title: Check Linear Independence
description: Algorithm to determine if set of vectors is linearly independent
explanation: Row reduce matrix to RREF. If number of non-zero rows equals number of vectors, they are independent. Otherwise dependent (some are linear combinations).

title: Find Basis from Spanning Set
description: Extract a basis from a spanning set using Gaussian elimination
explanation: Row reduction identifies which columns/rows are linearly independent. Pivot columns correspond to basis vectors in the original set.

title: Find Dimension of Column Space
description: Compute dimension (rank) of column space using SVD or Gaussian elimination
explanation: Dimension of column space equals rank of matrix. Can find via row reduction (pivot count), QR decomposition, or singular value decomposition.

title: Change of Basis Coordinates
description: Convert coordinates from one basis to another
explanation: Change of basis matrix P transforms coordinates. If C is new basis, P = B⁻¹C converts B-coords to C-coords. For standard to new basis, P = C⁻¹.

title: Find Null Space Basis
description: Find basis vectors for solution space of homogeneous system Ax = 0
explanation: Free variables determine null space basis vectors. Each free variable produces one null space vector. Number of free variables = nullity = n - rank.
